scope: Pass B full-surface expansion: 15 read streams covering symbol/ETF universes, the screener, delisted companies, market indexes, S&P 500 constituents, the earnings calendar, and 8 per-symbol fan-out streams (company_profile, quote, historical_price, income_statement, balance_sheet_statement, cash_flow_statement, key_metrics, financial_ratios) fanning out over the new `symbols` config list. FMP publishes 100+ endpoints across intraday/technical-indicator variants, bulk/batch downloads, SEC filing full-text, insider trading, institutional 13F holdings, ETF/mutual-fund sub-holdings, and country-specific exchange mirrors (EuroNext/TSX) — these are excluded per-category below rather than enumerated one-by-one where they are a repeating shape (e.g. 6 intraday-interval variants per asset class). FMP is a read-only market-data API; no write/mutation endpoints exist anywhere in its documented surface, so capabilities.write stays false.
